message:
fix(plan): add needs_compensation tracking to TxResumeState

is_fully_resolved() previously missed the case where commit partially
failed but compensation had not yet started. Add an explicit
needs_compensation field computed from commit_report.has_failures()
and a convenience has_pending_work() method. Derive PartialEq/Eq on
TxIdempotencyCheck for round-trip test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
